childhood.familyBackground: Born in Banpo-dong, Seocho-gu, Seoul as the second child (one older sister) in a wealthy family. Father Park Won-ho is the chairman of DI Corporation, a semiconductor testing equipment company. Mother Kim Young-hee runs a restaurant in Gangnam. Grew up affluent as the son of a successful industrialist.
childhood.education: Graduated from Banpo Elementary School, Banpo Middle School, and Sehwa High School. Enrolled at Boston University in 1996 to study International Business at his father's urging, but lost interest in academics after arriving in America. Transferred to Berklee College of Music but dropped out without completing his degree and returned to Korea to pursue music.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in a privileged environment in Seoul's affluent Seocho district. Was expected to take over his father's semiconductor business but chose to pursue music instead. His time in the United States exposed him to diverse music genres that shaped his unique style.
childhood.source: Korean Wikipedia, Namu Wiki, Yonsei Business School
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 서울 서초구 반포동에서 1남 1녀 중 막내로 출생. 아버지 박원호는 반도체 검사장비 업체 디아이(DI Corporation) 회장. 어머니 김영희는 강남에서 레스토랑 운영. 성공한 기업인의 아들로 유복하게 성장.
childhood.educationKo: 반포초등학교, 반포중학교, 세화고등학교 졸업. 1996년 아버지의 권유로 보스턴 대학교 국제경영학과에 입학했으나 미국 도착 후 공부에 흥미를 잃음. 이후 버클리 음악 대학에 편입했으나 학위를 마치지 않고 중퇴, 음악을 위해 한국에 귀국.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 서울의 부유한 서초 지역에서 특권적인 환경에서 성장. 아버지의 반도체 사업을 이어받을 것으로 기대되었으나 음악의 길을 선택. 미국 유학 시절 다양한 음악 장르에 노출되어 독특한 스타일 형성에 영향.

careerTimeline.event: Debuted with first album 'PSY From The Psycho World!', gaining attention for provocative and humorous style
careerTimeline.eventKo: 1집 《PSY From The Psycho World!》로 정식 데뷔, 도발적이고 유머러스한 스타일로 주목

careerTimeline.event: Arrested for marijuana use shortly after debut, receiving a fine
careerTimeline.eventKo: 데뷔 직후 대마초 흡연 혐의로 조사받아 벌금형 처분

careerTimeline.event: Began military service as an industrial technical personnel (special service)
Forced to re-enlist in active military duty after being found guilty of inadequate service during first term
careerTimeline.eventKo: 1차 복무 중 부실복무 판정을 받아 현역으로 재입대

careerTimeline.event: Released album 'PSY Five' after completing second military service, marking his comeback
careerTimeline.eventKo: 2차 군복무 마친 후 앨범 《PSY 5집》 발매, 컴백

careerTimeline.event: 'Gangnam Style' became a global phenomenon, first YouTube video to reach 1 billion views, performed worldwide
careerTimeline.eventKo: '강남스타일'이 세계적 현상이 됨. 유튜브 최초 10억 뷰 달성, 전 세계에서 공연

careerTimeline.event: Released 'Gentleman', continuing global success with over 1 billion YouTube views
careerTimeline.eventKo: '젠틀맨' 발매, 유튜브 10억 뷰 이상으로 글로벌 성공 지속

careerTimeline.event: Founded P NATION entertainment agency after leaving YG Entertainment, signing Jessi, HyunA, and DAWN as first artists
careerTimeline.eventKo: YG엔터테인먼트를 떠나 P NATION 엔터테인먼트 설립, 제시·현아·던을 첫 아티스트로 영입

careerTimeline.event: Released 'That That' produced by BTS's SUGA, marking another major hit and comeback
careerTimeline.eventKo: BTS 슈가가 프로듀싱한 'That That' 발매, 또 한 번의 대히트 컴백

failures.description: Arrested for marijuana use shortly after his debut, dealing a major blow to his nascent career. He confessed to smoking marijuana regularly in the US and smuggling it into Korea.
failures.lesson: The scandal taught him early that public figures face intense scrutiny and that personal choices have professional consequences. He later referenced this as a period when his career was at rock bottom.
failures.descriptionKo: 데뷔 직후 대마초 흡연으로 적발되어 신생 커리어에 큰 타격. 미국에서 대마초를 상습적으로 피웠으며 귀국 시 몰래 반입했다고 자백.
failures.lessonKo: 공인은 강도 높은 감시를 받으며 개인적 선택이 직업적 결과를 초래한다는 것을 일찍 배움. 이후 이 시기를 커리어가 땅끝까지 갔던 때로 회고.

failures.description: Found guilty of inadequate military service — he performed entertainment activities over 100 times during his special service term. Was forced to re-enlist as active duty soldier, losing years of his career prime.
failures.lesson: Cutting corners on obligations leads to greater consequences. The re-enlistment cost him precious career years but ultimately contributed to his more mature and grounded public image.
failures.descriptionKo: 특례 복무 기간 중 100여 차례 연예활동을 한 부실복무로 적발. 현역으로 재입대해야 했으며 커리어 전성기의 수년을 잃음.
failures.lessonKo: 의무를 소홀히 하면 더 큰 대가를 치르게 됨. 재입대로 소중한 커리어 시간을 잃었으나 결국 더 성숙하고 안정된 공인 이미지 형성에 기여.

failures.description: Follow-up singles after 'Gangnam Style' including 'Gentleman' and 'Hangover' achieved respectable numbers but could never replicate the phenomenon-level success, leading to the narrative of a 'one-hit wonder' globally.
failures.lesson: Lightning-in-a-bottle viral success is nearly impossible to replicate. Rather than chasing another global phenomenon, he eventually focused on building a sustainable domestic career and his own agency.
failures.descriptionKo: '강남스타일' 이후 '젠틀맨', '행오버' 등 후속곡들이 괜찮은 성적을 거뒀으나 현상급 성공을 재현하지 못해 글로벌 '원히트원더' 서사가 형성됨.
failures.lessonKo: 바이럴 대성공을 반복하는 것은 거의 불가능. 또 다른 글로벌 현상을 쫓기보다 지속 가능한 국내 커리어와 자체 기획사 구축에 집중.

quotes.context: Said while teaching Britney Spears his horse dance, becoming a famous catchphrase in America
quotes.contextKo: 브리트니 스피어스에게 말춤을 가르치며 한 말로, 미국에서 명언으로 회자됨

quotes.text: Because of bad things, my career went to the very bottom of the earth. But I came back stronger each time.
quotes.context: Reflecting on his marijuana arrest and military re-enlistment scandals during an interview
quotes.textKo: 안 좋은 일로 커리어가 땅끝까지 갔다. 하지만 매번 더 강하게 돌아왔다.
quotes.contextKo: 대마초 사건과 재입대 스캔들을 회고하며 인터뷰에서

quotes.text: Love starts to fade when you feel uncomfortable around someone. But my wife has never once made me feel uncomfortable.
quotes.context: Speaking on Healing Camp about his relationship with his wife
quotes.textKo: 사랑이 식기 시작하는 건 불편하다고 느낄 때입니다. 그런데 제 부인은 단 한 번도 불편하지 않았어요.

personalTraits.knownFor: Creator of 'Gangnam Style', the first YouTube video to reach 1 billion views and a defining moment in global K-pop history. Known for his humorous, satirical music style that contrasts flashy visuals with self-deprecating comedy. Founder of P NATION entertainment agency. Son of DI Corporation chairman Park Won-ho. Known for his authenticity, resilience through multiple career-threatening scandals, and ability to reinvent himself.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Donated 500 million KRW to Severance Children's Hospital for pediatric psychological treatment, and an additional 500 million KRW to establish the 'PSY Treatment Room' for child psychiatric care. Donated all performance fees from military consolation concerts to the military after his discharge.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 유튜브 최초 10억 뷰를 달성한 '강남스타일'의 창시자이자 글로벌 K-pop 역사의 결정적 순간을 만든 인물. 화려한 비주얼과 자기 비하 코미디를 결합한 유머러스하고 풍자적인 음악 스타일로 유명. P NATION 엔터테인먼트 설립자. DI코퍼레이션 박원호 회장의 아들. 진정성, 여러 차례의 커리어 위기를 극복한 회복력, 자기 재창조 능력으로 알려짐.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 세브란스 어린이 병원에 소아 심리치료를 위해 5억 원 기부, 추가로 5억 원을 기부하여 소아 정신과 치료를 위한 '싸이 치료실' 조성. 제대 후에도 군 위문 공연 출연료 전액을 군에 기부.

sajuConnection.note: This field will be written by us. Leave null.
